cards.back: A human-centered design approach that involves empathy, ideation, prototyping, and testing to develop innovative solutions
A design approach that focuses on understanding the needs and behaviors of users to create products that are intuitive and effective
A collaborative research approach that involves stakeholders in the research process to co-create solutions and address social issues
A collaborative design approach that involves stakeholders in the design process to create solutions that meet their needs
The process of assessing the effects and outcomes of an intervention or program to measure its social impact
